title: verilog: fix sizing of constant args for tasks/functions

features.name: task with mixed-width arguments
features.description: Code should include a task declaration with one argument having explicit width and another having implicit single-bit width

features.name: task call with mixed-width arguments
features.description: Code should include a task call passing an 8-bit value and a 1-bit constant, where the constant argument width affects the result

features.name: concatenation using task arguments
features.description: Code should include a concatenation operation in an assignment where one operand is a task argument that receives a mixed-width constant
